title: T1K Activation Fragment
description: Maps request keywords to skills (t1k-activation-*.json). ADDITIVE — all matches collected across all fragments.

priority.description: Fragment priority — used for ordering but activation is ADDITIVE (higher does not suppress lower)

description.description: Human-readable description of this activation fragment

sessionBaseline.description: Skills activated every session regardless of keyword match. Use only for required/core skills.

mappings.description: Keyword-to-skill mappings. All matching entries are collected (additive).

keywords.description: Keywords that trigger activation of the listed skills

skills.description: Skill names to activate when any keyword matches
